name: Vengeful Spirit / Onryo
signs: anger imprint; same person seen repeatedly; records tied to suspects; temperature drop near keepsake
behaviors: escalates over time; targets a list; becomes more physical as it rises
actions: manifest strike; fear aura; targeted haunting
kill: locate remains and burn them or resolve the grudge

name: Poltergeist
signs: objects thrown; activity centered around one person; EMF spikes; broken glass in safe rooms
behaviors: builds pressure; lashes out through environment; centers on emotional source
actions: telekinetic assault; environmental manipulation; escalation surge
kill: identify anchor person and remove or resolve emotional trigger

name: Wraith
signs: life-drain marks; shadows moving independently; cold around tether; mirrors dim near target
behaviors: stalks from dark; avoids direct light; feeds before manifesting
actions: life drain; shadow step; tether pull
kill: destroy tether object after revealing it

name: Woman in White
signs: roadside apparition; hitchhiker reports; phrase repeated by victims; water or rain motif
behaviors: lures emotionally vulnerable targets; repeats last moments; brief possession during spikes
actions: luring presence; echo loop; limited possession
kill: resolve emotional loop or lay remains to rest

name: Possessor Demon
signs: blackouts; personality inversion; sulfur trace; black-eyed reflection
behaviors: hides in host; isolates allies; uses social access
actions: borrowed face; pain split; host override
kill: separate demon from host, trap or banish before repossession

name: Grief Haunt
signs: mourning object moves; dreams of deceased; family cannot leave home; photos weep or burn
behaviors: feeds on unresolved grief; protects anchor family; punishes denial
actions: memory loop; emotional pressure; spirit interference
kill: name the grief, resolve the anchor, cleanse the mourning object

name: Werewolf / Rugaru
signs: large prints; animal attack too precise; silver aversion; survivor with bite fever
behaviors: hunts by scent; attacks isolated prey; flees bad odds
weaknesses: silver; bait trap; moon cycle knowledge
kill: silver strike to heart or complete entity-specific kill condition

name: Vampire
signs: bloodless bodies; glamoured witness; night-only sightings; old property records
behaviors: uses charm; nests near food source; controls thralls
weaknesses: sunlight; heart destruction; dead blood trail
kill: destroy heart and force sunlight or sanctified end condition

name: Wendigo
signs: half-eaten bodies; familiar voices in dark; unnatural cold; huge thin prints
behaviors: mimics voices; ambushes from cold; gains after feeding
kill: burn completely before it feeds again

name: Djinn
signs: contradicting stories; reality mismatch; sleeping victims living fantasies; sealed vessel nearby
behaviors: isolates targets; twists desire; hides truth behind comfort
actions: reality illusion; isolation trap; wish distortion

name: Crossroads Demon
signs: sudden success followed by tragedy; contract traces; calm stranger; crossroads token
behaviors: never lies outright; twists meaning; waits for consent
actions: contract binding; word twist; possession escape
weaknesses: contract loophole; anchor object; true name
kill: break contract or destroy anchor, then bind by true name

name: Changeling
signs: personality shift; missing history; subtle household errors; iron aversion
behaviors: studies household; protects false identity; avoids open combat
actions: perfect mimicry; memory softening; social infiltration
weaknesses: iron; true identity reveal; family truth rite
kill: reveal true form, break exchange bargain, strike with iron or force retreat

name: Redcap
signs: rust-colored footprints; old blood in corners; broken teeth; ruined stonework
behaviors: hunts stragglers; loves cellars and ruins; gets bold after injury
actions: butcher rush; stone-hop; cap of blood
weaknesses: iron; consecrated ground; loss of cap
kill: corner away from blood source, ruin cap, finish with iron

name: Veil Render
signs: doors lead wrong; maps fail; missing time; unstable ward geometry
behaviors: traps before attacking; denies exits; uses false space
actions: veil split; false space; exit denial
weaknesses: stable sacred geometry; repaired wards; true anchor location
kill: collapse rift structure, then banish or bind before veil reseals
